name: Lê Hồng Quang
title: Senior Frontend Engineer
summary:
• Always want to research new technology and share knowledge with other team members. Be a team-player, not a know-it-all man.


• My strengths are UI/UX, building scalable web apps + reusable components/packages and monitoring, optimizing web performance.


• Playing with Gen AI is my hobbies now.

workExperience.description:
Coban UI - An app for managing data streaming infrastructure and pipelines.

• Impact: PIC. The only person in Viet Nam who takes responsibility, collects requirements, syncs meetings, and communicates with developers abroad to finish the OKRs.

• Tech stack: React, Ant Design, React Flow, Redux, Webpack, Module Federation (Micro FE), Framer Motion, Jest.


react-structured-search - A NPM library for quickly integrating autocomplete search queries with dynamic suggestions.

• URL: https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-structured-search

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/react-structured-search

• Impact: PIC. Helps other portals quickly integrate the global search for many resources.

• Tech stack: NPM, React, Typescript, Webpack, Storybook.


@web-platform/build-tool - A NPM CLI supports Webpack and RSpack to simplify and streamline the build process for frontend projects across Grab.

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/web-platform-build-tool

• Impact: PIC. Simplify and streamline the build process for frontend projects across Grab. Enhance efficiency and productivity for other front-end projects/ developers. More than 50 apps in Grab are using this tool.

• Tech stack: NPM, Webpack, RSpack, Babel, CLI, Typescript, Module Federation (Micro FE).


@web-platform/concedo-auth - A NPM library to integrate with Concedo OIDC (an authentication standard in Grab) effortlessly.

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/concedo-auth

• Impact: PIC. Simplify and streamline authentication processes for frontend projects. Improve consistency and compliance with security standards across Grab. More than 30 apps in Grab are using this tool.

• Tech stack: NPM, Webpack, JWT, Typescript.


slack-mcp-ai-assistant - A Slack bot that integrates with Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to provide AI-powered assistance with access to various tools and services. It summarizes requirements in a Slack thread. The output is a Merge Request with analytics.

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/slack-mcp-ai-assistant

• Impact: (personal project).

• Tech stack: LLM, Gen AI, MCP Servers, Slack API, Git.


slack-cursor-ide-assistant - A Slack bot that summarize requirements in a Slack thread and forwards messages to Cursor editor's chat (Agent mode) interface on macOS. This bot runs locally (for fast codebase indexing). Output is a Merge Request with analytics.

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/slack-cursor-ide-assistant

• RFC: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PqM_IaivSpb4itCDbPHWXmEBy2cmSdBJxUopteU1XSw/

• Impact: PIC. Automated request processing workflow for many projects in Grab for saving time.

• Tech stack: Slack Workflow, Cursor Agent, Gen AI, MCP Servers, Slack API, Git.


Code Style CV Generator - An app to generate developer-style CVs with a terminal/code-like design.

• URL: https://code-style-cv-generator.quang.work

• Git: (still not public).

• Impact: (personal project).

• Tech stack: NextJS, Tailwind CSS, Typescript, shadcn/ui, CSS Animation.

FunArcade - A Restaurant and Food reviewing website.

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/FoodMe-Frontend

• Impact: Leader. Support junior developers to refactor Front-end code.

• Tech stack: NextJS, Material UI, Redux, Redux Saga, Typescript, Styled

Components, Google Map SDK, AWS Cognito to authenticate.


GoFox - A Blockchain NFT marketplace.

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/GoFox-Frontend

• Impact: PIC. Build from scratch the Front-end, maintain the Back-end and setup CI/CD.

• Tech stack: MERN stack, Back-end with ExpressJS + MongoDB + Swagger Docs. Front-end with ReactJS (Hooks) + Material UI + @reduxjs/toolkit + Typescript + ESLint + Styled Components + Web3/Ethers + Solidity Smart Contract on Ethereum and BSC network.


FunArcade - A Bitcoin gambling website.

• Git: https://github.com/quang1225/FunArcade-Frontend

• Impact: PIC. Build from scratch the Front-end.

• Tech stack: ReactJS (Hooks) + Material UI + Redux, Redux Saga + SocketIO + Reselect + Immutable + Typescript + ESLint + Styled Components.


Maven - A video hosting platform.

• Impact: PIC, build from scratch the Front-end.

• Tech stack: NextJS (SSR) and deploy Serverless environment (Vercel, AWS Amplify, AWS Cloudfront). Auth0 to authenticate multiple apps on multiple domains. ReactJS (Hooks and Functional Components), Redux, Redux Saga, Typescript.

iVIVU Member - An authentication and authorization, user point reward system.

• Impact: PIC, build from scratch the Front-end.

• Tech stack: Angular, jQuery, Bootstrap, and Back-end with Restful API .NET Core (JWT + Refresh Token).


iVIVU Experience - A review of hot foods, hotels, and travel places websites.

• Impact: PIC, build from scratch the Front-end.

• Tech stack: Angular Universal (SSR), jQuery, Bootstrap.


iVIVU Flight- A flight booking website.

• URL: https://www.ivivu.com/ve-may-bay

• Impact: Supporter. Implement new feature and maintainFont-end. Create Chrome extension to crawl flight price from official brand pages.

• Tech stack: Javascript, Chrome extension.

Olay Skin Advisor - A sub-function of Olay.com. Build front-end with .NET MVC.

• URL: https://olay.com/skin-advisor

• Impact: Supporter. Maintain UI for the feature. Convert HTML templates from PSD, Sketches, and Figma.

• Tech stack: .NET MVC, MySQL.

• Gain experience in a professional Agile process in a big outsourcing company with 15+ team size.

items.title: Frontend Technologies
items.description:
- 10+ years of experience in Front-end. My main stack is NextJS/ React/ TypeScript. Thorough understanding of Functional Components, React Hooks.


- Have experience with SSR, SEO, Socket.io, Webpack, Babel, NPM management.


- Have experience working with Gen AI tools ( Cursor IDE, ChatGPT, Claude Code, MCP Servers )


- Have an architectural mindset, making clean + reusable + scalable components.


- Knowledge of web debugging, performance profiling and optimization ( using metric tools like Google Lighthouse, React Dev Tool, GTmetrix, WebPageTest..., to reduce side effects for minimum re-render... ).

items.title: English
items.description:
• Good reading, writing (8/10)

• General verbal communication (7/10)

items.title: Project Management
items.description:
- Deep understand GIT Flow, have experience with Jira, Slack.

- Familiar with Agile methodology, Scrum process.

items.title: Cloud
items.description:
- Azure ( setup Environment Slots, CICD on Azure DevOps and Github Action ).

- AWS ( deploy to AWS S3, AWS Lambda. Setup CICD. config AWS Cloudfront ).

- Google Cloud ( setup Pipeline CICD using App Engine + Docker ).

- GitLab CI/CD ( setup pipelines using YAML files ).

- GitHub Action ( setup workflows using YAML files ).
✈️ Traveling, 🏕️ Camping, ⚽ Football, 📽️ Short Film Making, 🎤 Singing, 🍻 Team gathering.
